name: Substring with Concatenation of All Words
title: Substring with Concatenation of All Words

discussion_posts.name: kraabhi
discussion_posts.content: Description of question is not good , various points are missing

discussion_posts.name: cornellouis
discussion_posts.content: I thought the question assumed all words were the same length?

discussion_posts.name: zwright8
discussion_posts.content: Can LeetCode start adding the efficiency requirements to all the Description sections? It would make problem solving much less tedious

discussion_posts.name: Dany__Guty
discussion_posts.content: This will save you: you need to increment the window one by one, there\'s no way to pass the testcases in increments in the window of n = words[0].size()

discussion_posts.name: UnitedIngvar
discussion_posts.content:
Additional description point:
The words can overlap, like in this example from the test cases:
s =
"lingmindraboofooowingdingbarrwingmonkeypoundcake"
words =
["fooo","barr","wing","ding","wing"]

Please, add this to the description, it is not clear

discussion_posts.name: leolin479
discussion_posts.content:
For the example case

Input: s = "wordgoodgoodgoodbestword", words = ["word","good","best","word"]
Output: []

The standard answer was "output: [8]", which preventing my code to be submitted.

discussion_posts.name: darcylmx
discussion_posts.content: Ignoring the key information(all the words are the SAME length) will cause exponential time complexity.\n\nOtherwise, it is just linear time to check a match.

discussion_posts.name: Jerrysuu
discussion_posts.content: This example waste me lots of time until I saw others\' answer.
